accounts package#

Subpackages#

Submodules#

accounts.admin module#

accounts.apps module#

class accounts.apps.AccountsConfig(app_name, app_module)[source]#

Bases: AppConfig

name = 'accounts'#

accounts.models module#

accounts.tests module#

accounts.urls module#

URL routing configuration for the User Accounts application. Handles signing up new users, logging in to existing accounts, and logging out.

accounts.views module#

accounts.views.login_view(request)[source]#

Authenticates a user and starts a session.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The HTTP request containing login credentials.

Returns:

Redirects to dashboard on successful login or renders login page with error messages on failure.

Return type:

HttpResponse

accounts.views.logout_view(request)[source]#

Logs out the user and terminates the current session.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The HTTP request object.

Returns:

Redirects to the login page after logging out.

Return type:

HttpResponse

accounts.views.signup_view(request)[source]#

Registers a new user by creating a User instance in the database.

Expected POST data: username (email), password, and full name.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The HTTP request containing user registration data.

Returns:

Redirects to dashboard on successful registration or renders signup page with error messages on failure.

Return type:

HttpResponse
